name: Banana Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all the ingredients in a blender until smooth and creamy.
2. Pour the mixture into the pre-baked pie crust.
3. Bake for 30 minutes or until set. Allow to cool before serving.
4. You can top with a layer of yogurt and decorate with fresh fruit, such as strawberry and banana slices.
5. Serve well chilled. Without eggs and honey, each serving contains 410 calories, 49 milligrams cholesterol, 18 grams fat, and 11 grams protein.
